description: ALPHA: subject to change. One autonomous utterance by the RBI chair's publishing pipeline, ledgered for public verification. Append-only by construction: a stranger fetches this record, fetches its derivation input, re-hashes, and compares. Every field here exists so that Q-6 (every autonomous post is auditable) is a mechanism, not a promise.

main.description: One utterance, one entry. The entry is written atomically with the post (VOICE-1 §5.5): persist as pending before submission, finalize with postUri/postCid after. A pending entry whose post failed is removed; a finalized entry is permanent.

postUri.description: The utterance, pinned. Absent on a pending entry that never finalized; present and permanent on every entry whose post went live.

postCid.description: The content ID of the post record, pinning its exact bytes. Absent until finalized.

derivationInput.description: The signed source the adapter read. For class 1 (TreeLanding): repo@sha. For future classes: at-uri#cid or other verifiable reference.

inputDigest.description: sha256 hex of the exact input bytes the adapter read. The stranger's verification starts here: fetch the input, re-hash, compare.

adapterClass.description: Which law produced this speech. Class 1 is 'TreeLanding'. Each class is a founder-gated adapter ratified under Q-8.

adapterDigest.description: sha256 hex of the adapter's source bytes. Identifies exactly which code derived this utterance — a stranger verifying a post verifies which code produced it.

modelDigest.description: sha256 of the model weights (A-2). The mind that spoke, pinned and verifiable at load.

promptDigest.description: sha256 of the system prompt (A-2). The instructions that governed the inference, pinned and verifiable at load.

createdAt.description: RFC 3339 witness time — when this entry was written, not when the post was authored.
